disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Spontaneous nosebleed that began about an hour ago with no trauma and is still oozing despite continuous pressure
trigger_question_examples: Tell me about the bleeding — when did it start and does anything stop it?
Is the nose still bleeding now?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It started out of nowhere about an hour ago. We're pressing on the soft part of the nose but it keeps oozing — it slows down and then starts again.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Widespread pinpoint purple-red spots on the dependent lower legs plus large painless bruises appearing without any injury
trigger_question_examples: Can you describe the spots and bruises — where are they and did anything cause them?
Do the spots fade when you press a glass on them?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: There are loads of tiny purple-red pinpoints all down the lower legs and some big purple bruises on the shins and arms — they just appeared, nothing hit them, and the little spots don't fade when I press on them.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The child is alert, well-perfused and non-toxic with a normal home-thermometer temperature and no drowsiness
trigger_question_examples: How is the child in themselves — alert, feeding, any fever?
Are they drowsy, floppy or hard to rouse?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: They're alert and talking, just quiet and a bit scared. No fever on our thermometer, they're not drowsy or floppy.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: A mild self-limiting viral upper-respiratory illness about two weeks before the bleeding started
trigger_question_examples: Has the child been unwell with any cold, virus or infection in the last few weeks?
Any recent illness before this started?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: They had a mild cold with a runny nose about two weeks ago but it got better on its own — nothing since.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No high fevers, no bone or joint pain, no weight loss, no night sweats
trigger_question_examples: Any fevers, bone or joint pain, weight loss or night sweats?
Have they been complaining of aches in their legs or back?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, none of that — no fevers, no aching bones, they haven't lost weight or had night sweats.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No NSAID or aspirin given, no other regular medicines, no known bleeding disorder or prior easy bruising
trigger_question_examples: Have you given any ibuprofen, aspirin or other medicines recently?
Has the child ever bled or bruised easily before?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No painkillers at all, no regular medicines, and they've never bruised or bled easily before — this is completely new.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No sudden severe headache, no confusion, no vomiting of blood and no black stools at present
trigger_question_examples: Any sudden bad headache, confusion, vomiting blood or black stools?
Is there blood anywhere else — in vomit, urine or stool?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No headache, they're thinking clearly, no vomiting blood and I haven't seen any blood in the toilet.
